pipeline_metadata.description: Delsys EMG processing: 4th-order 20-450 Hz Butterworth bandpass, full-wave rectification, 50 ms RMS moving window, and trial-maximum dynamic normalization.

NORMALIZATION.DESCRIPTION: Each channel is divided by its maximum RMS activation within the exported trial. Gait-cycle-specific normalization requires cycle boundaries and is not available in this first-pass Delsys stage.
